name: interact
description: Interact — browser + desktop automation via an MCP server

interact.projectPath.description: DEV ONLY — path to a local interact checkout to run via 'uv run' instead of the released build. Leave EMPTY (the default) to run the published interact from GitHub via uvx (zero-config). Never auto-detected, so opening a clone of the repo does not silently run your working tree. Can also be set with the INTERACT_PROJECT_PATH env var.

interact.display.currency.description: Currency for displaying spend in the dashboard. Costs are recorded in USD and converted at live ECB rates (frankfurter.app); display-only.

interact.image.model.description: Primary vision model for screenshot analysis and media understanding. Use 'Select Model' command for tested recommendations.

interact.video.model.description: Vision model for video understanding. Requires native video support. Use 'Select Model' command for tested recommendations.

interact.video.fps.description: Frames per second for video capture

interact.video.duration.description: Duration in seconds for video capture

interact.component.model.description: Vision model for UI element detection. Falls back to image model when empty. Use 'Select Model' command for tested recommendations.

interact.browser.slowMo.description: Slow down browser actions by this many milliseconds (useful for observing automation)

interact.vlm.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for VLM vision responses

interact.vlm.waitTimeout.description: Default timeout in ms for waiting on elements

interact.debug.dir.description: Save every screenshot to this folder as timestamped PNGs (for debugging)

enumDescriptions: Drive the real desktop session (system-wide input + capture)
Drive an isolated nested display (Xephyr) — a sandbox that never touches your real windows or cursor
interact.desktop.target.description: Where desktop automation acts: the real session, or an isolated nested display

interact.desktop.nestedDisplay.description: X display number for the nested desktop target (e.g. 99 → :99)

interact.desktop.nestedSize.description: Screen size of the nested desktop target (WIDTHxHEIGHT)

interact.desktop.nestedHeadless.description: Nested target only: ON = Xvfb in the background (CI/servers); OFF = Xephyr you can watch

scripts.compile: bash scripts/generate-types.sh && node scripts/sync-data.js && tsc -p ./ && node -e "try{require('fs').cpSync('src/models.json','out/models.json')}catch{}" && node -e "try{require('fs').cpSync('src/benchmarks.json','out/benchmarks.json')}catch{}" && node -e "try{require('fs').cpSync('src/settings.json','out/settings.json')}catch{}" && npm run build:webview
